detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SAUDICULT.openTrading() (SAUDICULT.sol#557-583):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (SAUDICULT.sol#567)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (SAUDICULT.sol#569)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (SAUDICULT.sol#569)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (SAUDICULT.sol#579)
	SAUDICULT.tradingOpen (SAUDICULT.sol#267) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SAUDICULT.openTrading() (SAUDICULT.sol#557-583)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [SAUDICULT.openTrading()](SAUDICULT.sol#L557-L583):

	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](SAUDICULT.sol#L569)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](SAUDICULT.sol#L569)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tradingOpen = true](SAUDICULT.sol#L579)

	- [SAUDICULT.openTrading()](SAUDICULT.sol#L557-L583)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SAUDICULT._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SAUDICULT.sol#425-487):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SAUDICULT.sol#469)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SAUDICULT.sol#501-513)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SAUDICULT.sol#475)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (SAUDICULT.sol#551)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (SAUDICULT.sol#485)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SAUDICULT.sol#639)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SAUDICULT.sol#619)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SAUDICULT.sol#621)
	SAUDICULT._rOwned (SAUDICULT.sol#227) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SAUDICULT._takeTeam(uint256) (SAUDICULT.sol#633-641)
	- SAUDICULT._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SAUDICULT.sol#615-629)
	- SAUDICULT.balanceOf(address) (SAUDICULT.sol#343-347)
	- SAUDICULT.constructor() (SAUDICULT.sol#293-307)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (SAUDICULT.sol#485)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SAUDICULT.sol#647)
	SAUDICULT._rTotal (SAUDICULT.sol#243) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SAUDICULT._getCurrentSupply() (SAUDICULT.sol#739-749)
	- SAUDICULT._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SAUDICULT.sol#645-651)
	- SAUDICULT.constructor() (SAUDICULT.sol#293-307)
	- SAUDICULT.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SAUDICULT.sol#399-407)
